title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, the day of the Japanese Derby has
come. Mejiro Ardan expresses her gratitude for
my support through every step of the journey.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Declaring that she'll win me the title of Derby
trainer, she presses on to the stage where the
decisive battle is to take place.
